title: 5. GSAP transitions
description: Add GSAP-driven transitions for board load, tab changes, column/card stagger, and task detail open/close.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Added GSAP transitions for board and task detail panel via useGSAP hooks.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Added exit animation for task detail panel with GSAP (backdrop and panel slide/fade) before unmount.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Registered gsap useGSAP plugin in console/src/main.tsx.

custom.beads_acceptance_criteria: All key interactions animate via GSAP and clean up on unmount; transitions are consistent across tabs and detail panel.
